creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
If one chooses the "Getting FreeBSD" on the FreeBSD homepage, she gets to       
the page http://www.freebsd.org/availability.html.                              
                                                                             
However, this page does not mention CVS at all!                                 
                                                                                
IMO, at least a link to some page describing how to obtain FreeBSD would        
be very useful. <http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/synching.html#ANONCVS>         
might be one such link, for example.

Fix: 

see above
How-To-Repeat: see above
